programs.title: Kings of Restoration
programs.desc: Mark Bassett brings in a late 1800s railroad hand-car. Can Rick's skill transform this rusty wreck into a museum-quality marvel?

programs.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programs.desc: Competitors that include a military veteran and martial artists put their custom knives to the test. Their arsenal of blades includes a fantasy cutter, a kukri and a hand-forged longsword.

programs.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programs.desc: The host visits various regions in India in order to shed light on the incredible works of a miniaturist, martial artist and two hairdressers.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Barry develops an effective strategy with his masked bidder at Riverside, California. Elsewhere, Rene is in need of a cleanse after going through his risqué room.

actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss

programs.title: Counting Cars
programs.desc: Danny and his team tackle a 1960s Cadillac restoration, aiming to match its interior with a bold root beer paint job. Meanwhile, Jeff Blando seeks the final touches for his custom chopper.

actor: Danny Koker,Kevin Mack,Mike \"Horny\" Henry,Ryan Evans,Shannon Aikau

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.
